methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Cross-border drone attack and US Iran plans spike regional risks
bullets: Syria repelled a drone attack launched from Iraq against a US military base, confirming cross-border militant threats along Turkey's southern border.
The US is considering weeks-long ground operations in Iran, a development that could dramatically expand the conflict zone near Turkey's eastern frontiers.
Iran's Islamic Guards claimed missile strikes on aluminium plants in Bahrain and the UAE, showcasing Tehran's willingness to engage in long-range attacks amid regional tensions.
